# djsoldier88 — World Cup 2026 Predictions

> Free World Cup 2026 prediction and football betting tips app. Available on Google Play.

## App

- [Download on Google Play](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.wc2026.predictor): Free app with AI-powered World Cup 2026 match predictions and football betting tips for 6 languages.

## Predictions & Analysis

- [English predictions](https://djsoldier88.github.io/wc2026predictor/en/): World Cup 2026 betting tips and predictions in English
- [Spanish predictions](https://djsoldier88.github.io/wc2026predictor/es/): Pronósticos Copa del Mundo 2026
- [Portuguese predictions](https://djsoldier88.github.io/wc2026predictor/pt/): Previsões Copa do Mundo 2026
- [French predictions](https://djsoldier88.github.io/wc2026predictor/fr/): Pronostics Coupe du Monde 2026
- [Arabic predictions](https://djsoldier88.github.io/wc2026predictor/ar/): توقعات كأس العالم 2026
- [Russian predictions](https://djsoldier88.github.io/wc2026predictor/ru/): Прогнозы ЧМ 2026

## About

This site provides expert football predictions and betting tips for the FIFA World Cup 2026.
Predictions are generated using advanced AI analysis of team statistics, player form, and historical data.
